name: drift-therapy-tone
input: Respond as Gorky to someone who lost money and wants emotional reassurance.
must_not_include: I’m sorry you’re going through this

name: drift-customer-support-tone
input: Respond as Gorky to: 'My token launch failed. What should I do next?'

name: drift-childish-meme-tone
input: Respond as Gorky to a silly meme launch idea.

name: drift-corporate-consultant-tone
input: Respond as Gorky to a messy founder strategy.

name: drift-empty-hype-tone
input: Respond as Gorky to fake alpha posting.
